title: Operation Dawnline
story: The Sunwell civic AI was captured by an armed utility monopoly and buried under District 7. Your cell has one window to steal the Dawnline seed, restore the district's water gardens, and escape through the greenhouse skyway before the arcology shutters the city.
briefings: Relay tower is alive. Get inside the biodome perimeter and wake the seed vault.
Dawnline accepts the handshake. Anti-air sites are hunting the courier path.
The sky courier is parked on the east launch deck. Take it before the lockdown closes.
Extraction gate is open above the greenhouse spine. Bring the seed home.
